title: PMF Review
use_when: Use PMF Review at the handoff from the 0-1 build loop (Move 7, Ship + Learn) to the grow playbook when the team needs a forced decision between PMF, signal-but-not-PMF, no-PMF, or too-early — and a clear route to grow, iterate, or pivot/kill.
do_not_use_when: Do not use PMF Review for pre-launch thesis challenges (use $thesis-review), post-PMF growth funnel optimization (use $grow), incident response (use $operate), or general analytics readouts that do not require a fit call.
output_artifact: PMF review with cohort, evidence map, mode, super-user definition, counter-evidence, decision, and next gate
framework_fit: PMF Review fits the gate between $0-1 and $grow. It pressure-tests demand-side evidence (retention, super-user pull, qualitative signal) against the original beachhead and forces a route decision before growth effort is committed.
failure_modes: Declares PMF on activity metrics (signups, demos, reach) without demand-side pull evidence such as super-user retention, organic word-of-mouth, or qualitative super-user surveys.
Aggregates beachhead super-users with tourist cohorts, masking a narrow PMF pocket inside an apparently flat average and producing a false fit call.
Holds the decision in indefinite analysis instead of forcing PMF, signal-but-not-PMF, no-PMF, or too-early — and naming the next route.

examples.prompt: Use $pmf-review on our last quarter cohort to decide whether we move to $grow or run another $0-1 lap.
examples.expected_artifact: PMF review with cohort, evidence map, mode, super-user definition, counter-evidence, decision, and next gate
